issue: Community nodes not appearing in n8n UI despite multiple attempts
possible_issues: n8n 1.110.1 may not support community nodes the way they're installed
Community nodes may need to be installed through the n8n UI instead of manually
There may be a different configuration or environment variable required
The community nodes may need to be in a different format or structure
n8n may require a restart or specific trigger to discover community nodes
next_steps: Try installing community nodes through the n8n UI instead of manual installation
Check if there's a specific API endpoint to refresh/load community nodes
Research if n8n 1.110.1 has different community node requirements
Consider downgrading to a version that definitely supports community nodes
Contact n8n community forums for specific 1.110.1 community node issues
notes: Despite multiple attempts with different configurations, community nodes are not appearing in the n8n UI. The issue may be specific to n8n 1.110.1 or require a different installation method.
